We're making a simple e-commerce website. The website should have the following features:

<TechStackAndDesign>
For the tech stack, we are using Tailwind + Next.js with PayloadCMS and PostgreSQL.
Follow best practices for code structure, component reusability, and state management.
Follow modern UI/UX designs, stylish, modern and clean look.
Focus on a minimal black and white theme with medium rounded corners.
Use lucide-react for icons.
</TechStackAndDesign>
